summary: Bug Fix Verification Complete - All 3 bugs fixed and verified. Like/unlike toggle works correctly with persistence, comment submission works via singular /comment endpoint, and feed displays liked_by_user status properly.
critical_code_review_comments: SinglePost.js handleLike() correctly uses DELETE for unlike (line 96) and POST for like (line 98)
Backend get_optional_user_id_async() supports both JWT and session tokens (line 133-155)
Backend get_post() now uses async auth function for liked_by_user (line 360)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Like/unlike toggle uses correct HTTP methods (POST for like, DELETE for unlike), 2) Comment submission uses /comment (singular) endpoint, 3) liked_by_user status persists after page refresh. All 12 backend API tests pass. UI tests confirm like count changes from 1->2->1 correctly and comments appear and persist after submission.

backend_api_tests.test_full_like_unlike_cycle: PASS - Complete cycle verified with persistence

frontend_ui_tests.like_button_works: PASS - Like count increases from 1 to 2
frontend_ui_tests.like_persists_after_refresh: PASS - Like count remains 2 after refresh
frontend_ui_tests.unlike_button_works: PASS - Like count decreases from 2 to 1
frontend_ui_tests.unlike_persists_after_refresh: PASS - Unlike count remains 1 after refresh
frontend_ui_tests.comment_submission_works: PASS - Comment appears immediately after submission
frontend_ui_tests.comment_persists_after_refresh: PASS - Comment visible after page refresh
frontend_ui_tests.victory_lane_feed_shows_liked_status: PASS - Heart icon filled for liked posts

original_issues: Users cannot submit replies to single posts
When a user likes a post, the count does not increase after a page refresh
Likes appear to 'undo' or reset automatically

fixes_verified.fix: Changed endpoint from /comments (plural) to /comment (singular) in SinglePost.js line 144
fixes_verified.verification: Comment submission now works - comment appears and persists

fixes_verified.bug: Like count not persisting after refresh
fixes_verified.fix: Backend get_optional_user_id_async() now supports both JWT and session tokens
fixes_verified.verification: Like count persists after page refresh (tested 1->2, verified 2 after refresh)

fixes_verified.bug: Unlike not working - always calling POST
fixes_verified.fix: handleLike() now calls DELETE when wasLiked=true (line 96) instead of always POST
fixes_verified.verification: Unlike works - count decreases from 2->1 and persists after refresh

bug_fix_verification.verification_result: ALL BUGS FIXED - Full like/unlike/comment cycle works correctly
